title: Officers to whom not applicable
doc_html:
§182.  Officers to whom not applicable

The provisions of R.S. 42:181 shall not apply to the State Treasurer, the State Auditor, parish recorders and clerks of the district courts.
doc_text:
§182.  Officers to whom not applicable
The provisions of R.S. 42:181 shall not apply to the State Treasurer, the State Auditor, parish recorders and clerks of the district courts.
